entries.title: Player Profile pages are live
entries.summary: Every player name on rankings, lineups, and weekly recaps now links to a dedicated profile at /player.html?id=... Each profile shows the 10-factor decomposition, current-event snapshot, course history, and market positioning. Mobile-first. 82 players indexed.

entries.title: Rankings: type-to-filter search
entries.summary: New search input alongside the tier chips. Type a partial name; the table filters instantly. Combines with the existing tier filter using AND logic.

entries.title: Performance page: per-factor attribution chart
entries.summary: New section shows how the 10 BBI factors contributed to each top-10 finisher's score in Week 11 RBC Heritage. Reader can see at a glance whether talent, course fit, or form drove each ranking.

entries.title: Archive page: most-recent event flagged
entries.summary: Gold-star indicator now highlights the most recent scored event in the 47-event timeline. Week 11 RBC Heritage surfaces at the top of the list.

entries.title: Site performance pass
entries.summary: Prefetch hints on primary navigation paths; heaviest chart renders deferred past first paint. Faster feel on every page-to-page jump.

entries.title: Rankings page typography polish
entries.summary: Tighter header hierarchy, tabular numerals on numeric columns, clearer row-hover affordance. No data or behavior changes.

entries.title: Week 13 Miami Championship pre-event prep
entries.summary: Full briefing for Trump National Doral Blue Monster (par 72, April 30 – May 3): course DNA, winner archetype, three-tier player pool, pipeline notes. The approach game is the single highest-weight factor at Doral.

entries.title: ARGUS preflight — 6 DataGolf endpoints probed
entries.summary: Health check on the data feeds Monday's pipeline depends on. Five of six endpoints green; one non-critical endpoint returning 404 is flagged for investigation.

entries.title: Site goes live at ebrady25.github.io/birdie-buddy-live
entries.summary: First-time-live push. 10 pages, 14 JSON data sources, shared component system, jsdom-verified. Every future change from this point forward will be logged here.

entries.title: Landing page hero: measured-accuracy framing
entries.summary: Replaced rotating live-edge line with a single durable promise: 'One model. Forty-seven weeks of measured accuracy.' Proof callout cites Week 11 Spearman 0.344.

entries.title: Performance page: Weekly Recaps section
entries.summary: Expandable cards between the Spearman chart and Shadow Variants. Week 11 RBC Heritage seeded with an honest head-to-head recap.

entries.title: Shadow variant v8.7-cfgate added to the A/B slate
entries.summary: Course-fit lifted (+0.02) and a new gating rule caps the SG multiplier at 1.05x for players with fewer than 4 starts at a venue. Runs in shadow only — zero production risk.

entries.title: Public changelog launched
entries.summary: You're reading it. From now on, every shipped change to BirdieBuddy is logged here, reverse chronologically, with a category badge.

entries.title: Methodology page: plain-English Brier explainer
entries.summary: Rewrote the Brier score section for golf fans without a stats background. Added a concrete 10%-win example.

entries.title: Methodology page: typography + hierarchy pass
entries.summary: Refined heading scale, vertical rhythm, and section breaks using design-system tokens only.

entries.title: Landing page: typography + agent grid polish
entries.summary: Section padding lifted, agent grid cards given crisper borders and clearer Sonnet/Opus differentiation.

entries.title: Site data synced with latest tracker state
entries.summary: Week 11 RBC Heritage results (BBI 0.3437 vs 0.3770 Spearman) and Week 12 Zurich Classic deferral now reflected in the site's data layer.

entries.title: 10-page site verified (0 JS errors)
entries.summary: New jsdom harness confirms all 10 pages parse cleanly and every data path resolves. Gates every future site edit.

entries.title: Orchestrator era begins
entries.summary: New operating model: 10+ improvements shipped per day across model, site, content, and infrastructure. Every public change gets a receipt here.
